hotel_name: Tân Sơn Nhất Côn Đảo Resort (Tan Son Nhat Con Dao Resort)

reviews.title: So bad
reviews.text: Never come back again

reviews.title: Considering the amount of money, I think it is inexpensive if the location is right in front of the ocean
reviews.positives: Close the beach and there are shower outside. They have rental bike.
reviews.negatives:
Shower because it is difficult to control the temperature. 
I felt that The futon was damp. I think there were ticks and it was itchy.
I work up late at night to noisy sounds of returning tourists.

reviews.title: Don't waste your money
reviews.text: The pictures are not what the property is like. In my opinion the pictures are at least 15 years old, and are very much false advertising. The front of the building is nothing like the pictures, there is no reception desk as per the pictures, our bungalow leaked in the rain, the shower barely had water coming out of it, lights not working and dangerous power points. They are charging nightly rates for a 3.5 start property it is a 1 to 2 stars at best and should be charged accordingly. We travelled from Ho Chi Minh to Da Nang on a motorcycle and stayed in many different types of hotels and resorts, this was the equivalent of a $33 a room night for what we experienced. We feel completely ripped off as we went off the pictures and ratings to book this place

reviews.title: Good option for a beach-front hotel in Con Dao.
reviews.positives: I spent 6 nights in Con Dao at this hotel. I had booked a beach-front room on Booking.com and when I checked in, they gave me a beach-front room, but it wasn't the same type of room that is shown in the Booking.com listing.  I went back to reception to request that I be placed in the same type of beach-front room that I had seen on Booking.com and they where very accommodating to move me into one of the nicer beach-front rooms that had a bathroom inside, rather than the other type that has the bathroom and minibar area outside, which was hot and full of mosquitos since there was a small garden in the bathroom and the bathroom area was not sealed from the outside.  I also liked that the hotel was literally located on the beach and close to town, and on a beach you could swim and a little away from the pier.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is a little run down and the breakfast options for me where not that great. Not a lot of fresh fruit and it was more catered to Asian food, rather than a variety of fresh fruits or pastries.  Another thing I would suggest is they upgrade the bathrooms in the beach-front rooms (even the one I stayed in), they are very basic and could use a remodel and figure out how to reduce the grey water smell from the shower drain.

reviews.title: Stay away, far away.  This place is a dump.
reviews.text: Power was off half the time, cheap Chinese air conditioners that were basically just fans, and the food was frightening.  There was a rainstorm coming through the bathroom ceiling.  Completely awful in every coceivsble way.

reviews.title: Good Location, Comfortable beds
reviews.positives: Beachfront property. Central location
reviews.negatives: Slow service at the restaurant.

reviews.title: Perfect beach bungalow but don't expect western standards!
reviews.text:
The bungalow was very nice directly on the beach with a little terrace for reading or just watching the scenery. The beach directly in front of the hotel is a bit dirty but nothing critical. 
The resort looks like it was intended to be up to western standards however it isn't the case at all. It isn't a problem in itself but just be aware what to expect. Staff was helpful when we understood each other, and food and cocktails were nice. The top selling point is a bungalow ont he beach which isn't a shack like the camping; that's the main reason to stay there! For more comfort go for a hotel style accommodation.

reviews.title: It was good and worth the money
reviews.positives: Beach view.
reviews.negatives: The room needs more essential oil to eliminate the odor.

reviews.title: Don't expect too much
reviews.text: Noting was the way we expected. They forgot to get us at the airport. Meals are far overcharged, the food was inedible, breakfast only until 9am, noting left over after that, additional coffees were charged, and noisy drinking crowd were disturbing at night. Modestly furnished room.
reviews.positives: Small place at the most beautiful clean beach of Con Dao

reviews.title: Great value along the beach of Con Dao island
reviews.positives: The location of the property is perfect, it is right on the most beautiful beach on the island. The bungalows are well worth the cost. They could use some updating, I would suggest white washing all of the wood to make it lighter and brighter. Also, the bathroom shower needs some tile on the walls to cover the bare wall board. The staff is very friendly and do their best despite their limited English.  I loved being able to rent a motorbike directly from the hotel to explore the island.  Also, the spa was small, but the massage was amazing!
reviews.negatives: I did not really enjoy the buffet breakfast. The food was mediocre.  Also, in addition to the bathroom, needing to be updated, some areas of the property could use a good scrubbing. Overall, I liked the property and it was a very good value for the money.

reviews.title: 5 star location but no on-site management
reviews.text: Despite the admin problems from Day 1 (my room double booked, no remote for aircon, door key didn't work properly)the absolute beachfront location and view from the front door should have made up for it.But although most staff members were good natured, they were chronically disorganised, provided poor meal service (many menu items were not available)and could not help with basic questions about the islands.No-one was in charge and the manager lived in HCMC. Extremely dodgy place - best avoided.
reviews.positives: Right on the beach

reviews.title: Nice location, nice beach, good breakfast
reviews.positives: Right on the beach
reviews.negatives: A little boring. Maybe have some music playing near the beach. Beach chairs not comfortable.

reviews.title: Not ready for westerners yet
reviews.text:
The place has great potential but noone seems to care enough to get the detail right.
Con doa itself is an experience great place to do nothing.
After a couple of days you will be bored.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: The breakfast is not various

reviews.title: Nichts besonderes - überteuert und low service
reviews.text: I would not recommend going to this hotel, it is overpriced and customer service is very low. Also, for food you need to go outside. The beach has sand flies, so you need to be very careful! Staff is not very helpful if you have issues or need to rebook. Also nothing to do on the island is offered by the hotel.
reviews.positives: location and beach

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: few support by the reception desk for booking ferry tickets

reviews.title: A rat in our room!!!
reviews.text:
Good hotel in general if you don't have high expectation. This is a quiet place directly on the beach. However, you can't really relax on the beach because of the mosquitos. 

We are very disappointed with our stay and would not recommend this hotel because we had a rat in our room. In addition to walk in our room, there was feces in several place in the room including our personal luggage. We didn't sleep all night because the rat was running in the walk and seiling.

The manager didn't offer anything.

Do not go there!
reviews.positives: Quiet place

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.positives: Right on the beach!
reviews.negatives: They need purchase reclining beach chairs so guests can lay back and rest near the ocean, even take a rest!

reviews.title: Beach resort, relax but not good value for money
reviews.text: We think this resort is nicely located next to a quiet beach and all bungalows have direct access to the beach. However, the price is definitely not worth the quality and condition of the bungalow, as things are too basic, not so clean, run down and service level is not up to 3 star standard. If the bungalow is offered half price of what we paid, we're happy with it. We booked 3 nights but actually after 1 night, we decided to move to the next door resort which is cheaper, has a pool, and much cleaner.
reviews.positives: Nice staff, quiet beach

reviews.title: A great beachfront value on a spectacular island paradise!
reviews.positives: The staff were helpful and friendly. They stabbed motorbike rentals for us and made it so easy.  The beach is gorgeous and sensational for swimming. The restaurant is excellent.  We were not disappointed with any meal we ordered. The location relative to town was also great. It’s an easy walk to markets and many restaurants. The beds were comfortable and with great pillows. The free airport shuttle was much appreciated!
reviews.negatives: The water in the shower never got above like-warm. The beach bar was not always open when it should’ve been (but you could still get drinks from the restaurant). The room was somewhat plain without proper art placement.

reviews.title: Absolutely terrible staff
reviews.text: I asked for more information from the staff, they promised to call me in 10 mins, however 30 mins, 1 hour, even a day after they did not reply. I was so disappointed with this working style.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent buffet breakfast
reviews.negatives: Bathroom need more attention, floor was slippery and smell like urine

reviews.title: not to be recommended,especially as a "romantic" s
reviews.text:
to be honest,this short stay was quiet desapointing.my wife and i are used to travel a lot within vietnam and this was,by far, our worst stay. hotel is noisy due to the main road just behind it,rooms are not clean,food is average(breakfast is nearly non existant).
but actually,the whole lot was so desapointing that we decided to laugh about it rather than being upset.(and we still laugh when we think about our stay in that hotel...)
reviews.positives: none,unfortunately

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff poco amable y espacios muy sucios… le salva la ubicacion

reviews.title: Huge disappointment! Stay elsewhere!!!
reviews.text:
Stayed in the beachfront bungalow, which looked so cute on line but was a complete dump!!! Horrible lumpy saggy damp beds, doors and windows so old that didn’t close all the way so filled with mosquitos at night. 
The bathroom smelled horrible, possibly some kind of pesticide odor? 
It sits on a beautiful beach, but there are no sunbeds or beach chairs. A few broken porch chair are chained to trees (as if anyone would want broken chairs?) 
This is a sad depressing and extremely overpriced place!!! 
Stay at con dau Secret or anywhere else, don’t ruin your holiday.
reviews.response:
Dear Mrs Lisa
We are very sorry for the inconvenience when the facilities are not as you expected. We will try to improve and add more services to serve customers better. We thank you very much for your sharing

reviews.title: Boring
reviews.text:
This resort is good for honeymooners who will spend most of their time with each other indoors. But there is nothing to do except walking on the beach, which is always littered with garbage brought by the tide. There is no fitness club and no swimming pool. Worst of all are the sandlies. No one warned me, and I counted up to more than 200 bites that where itching for the rest of my weeklong stay. The weather was very windy every day and cloudy with showers. I thought it was sunny like islands in Thailand in february, but that is not the case. 
Finally, I love Vietnamese food, but what they served in Con Dao was simply disgusting. I ended up eating Pizza at Infiniti cafe.
My advise is to go somewhere else.

reviews.title: Correct mais pour une 3 étoiles on s’attendait à mieux.
reviews.positives:
Le lieu idyllique avec la vue sur mer. 
Le personnel au petit soin. Les massages au top avec des masseuses très professionnelles. 
La chambre spatieuse. 
La navette aller-retour pour l’aéroport. 
Très belle situation géographique.
reviews.negatives:
L’odeur dans la salle d’eau. Mauvaise finition dans la salle de bain (moisissure sur le bois). 
Les baies vitrées qui ferment mal et laissent un jour entre les deux, ce qui provoque une invasion de fourmi et autres insectes + courant d’air.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings by the sea
reviews.text: We chose this place for its sea view, and it delivered. However, the rest was a letdown. Our beachfront bungalow desperately needs updates—everything feels old and shabby. It's as if the owner has neglected the place. The breakfast was disappointingly cold with a bland taste. The staff and cleanliness were just okay. While we might return to the charming Con Dao, this hotel won't be our choice.

reviews.title: Le site est fabuleux et mérite un service accru !
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement du bungalow avec vue sur la plage !
Le service de SPA (massage, coiffage)
reviews.negatives:
Le bungalow attribué au départ était triple lit et non lit double comme réservé. De plus il était juste à côté du restaurant sonorisé une partie de la journée et de la soirée. Il a fallut demander à déménager au calme. Mais le bungalow n'était disponible que 3 nuits sur 7 réservées ! Nous avons ensuite déménager dans un 3ème bungalow heureusement juste à côté.
Le niveau d'anglais du personnel de la réception est très faible et ne permet pas de discuter sereinement. Il faut employer google traduction ! Les locaux communs méritent une rénovation. Le petit déjeuner est fourni de façon aléatoire (approvisionnement en fruits par exemple)

reviews.title: Nice, but certainly not luxury
reviews.text: The resort is in a nice place on the beach. We had a beach front room and the view was beautiful. The room was dated with maintenance needed. It particularly needs something to fill gaps under doors to stop centipedes and other creatures coming in. Breakfast was a huge disappointment- the food quality was poor, cold and not refilled.  Even the Vietnamese coffee was the worst we had in our 3 week trip.

reviews.title: Nuit agréable au bord de l’eau
reviews.positives: L’emplacement au bord de la mer avec accès direct, la terrasse et la chambre très spacieuse. La navette pour le ferry.
reviews.negatives:
La salle de bain est un peu défraîchie. Les rideaux ne sont pas très occultants donc réveillés tôt par la lumière.
Le petit déjeuner ne nous a pas plu (jus d’orange industriel, peu d’options en dehors des plats vietnamiens).

Hot water was temperamental, mould in bathroom, wooden slats rotten in bathroom, very basic. Go next door Can Dao Resort hands down

reviews.title: not what i expected for a $90 room
reviews.text: staff were undertrained and always blamed on hotel policy for whatever problems encountered. no service from 10:30pm. not even the bar. beware of bugs which i think from the bedding. i got bitten from a few and still itching after a couple of days. they do take credit cards but charge you 3%, and don't take debit cards. so make sure you have enough cash. the town is quite small and it's only 5 min walk away so it's quite convenient if you want to explore the old town. seafood restaurants are literally across the road. overall, i don't think i would pay $90 per night again for this kind of service.
reviews.positives: close to town, fresh seafood, own beach

A big problem was the language most of the staff didn´t únderstand english at all. We had two rooms and in both we had rats running and eating on everything inside the rooms at night and in the ceiling at day. So the nights sleep was not good at all. Because you have to chase the rats in the rooms to get them out, only to find them back soon.

Room floor is still wet when check in.  Aircond is noisy for the whole night. Not enough light in the room. Old material in the bathroom but all still function ok. 

Breakfast is Vietnamese style and coffee is cool.

reviews.title: Can be better
reviews.text:
The resort is beach front, my beach view room was blocked by big trees, I see no ocean and no beach. The room is dated, the facility is old and crumbling . The breakfast area is spartan and ugly . The beachfront villas looks nice but I didn’t stay there. The beach is nice but no beach chair, no pool. The area is quiet about 5 10 minutes walk to con dao market. 
I think you get what you pay for for a beach front resort

reviews.title: Mit Abstand die teuerste und schlechteste Unterkunft auf unserer Reise
reviews.positives:
Die Lage am Strand ist traumhaft, die Bungalows werden jeden Tag geputzt und es gibt frische Handtücher 
Früher Checkin war möglich :)
reviews.negatives:
Das war mit großem Abstand die teuerste Unterkunft bei unserer vierwöchigen Reise durch Vietnam. Wir haben das Resort gebucht, um nochmal etwas Ruhe und „Luxus“ zu haben (im Vergleich zu Homestays oder Hostels) und wurden sehr enttäuscht.
Wir wurden jeden morgen um kurz vor 7 Uhr von einem Gärtner mit Laubbläser „geweckt“.
Frühstück gibt es nur bis 9 Uhr, und ab 8:30 gibt es quasi nur noch die Reste und es wird nichts mehr aufgefüllt. Ich hatte das Personal zwei Mal um Kaffee gebeten, aber nichts kam.
Das Essen ist im Vergleich zu anderen eher teuer.
Am Strand gibt es leider überhaupt keine Liegen und die Strandflöhe sind tatsächlich nerviger als wir gedacht hätten.
In der Dusche kommen kleine Würmer zwischen den Fliesen raus und es gibt nicht wirklich warmes Wasser, was zwar verständlich ist, aber schade.

reviews.title: Die Lage ist sehr schön
reviews.text: Wir wohnten in einem Seeview Bungalow. Das Zimmer ist groß genug, es standen 3 Betten drin. Die Matratzen müssten erneuert werden. Das Frühstück ist reichlich und ganz ok. Es laufen Hunde rum. Die sind zwar brav aber m. E. sollten sie keinen Zugang zum Restaurant haben. Die Aussicht ist super, der Strand picobello und es wird immer geschaut daß alles in Ordnung und gepflegt ist.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Lage sehr gut, Frühstück schlecht,insgesamt runter gekommen, schade, könnte sehr schön sein.

reviews.title: so so
reviews.text: Nice beach, staffs are not really friendly and supportive, room design gives uncomfortable feeling with fly inside and cheap room made

reviews.title: Traumhafte Lage mit Mängeln
reviews.positives: Exzellente Lage, Bungalow mit traumhaftem Meerblick, wunderschöner Privatstrand
reviews.negatives: Ausstattung (Badezimmer auf jeden Fall renovierungsbedürftig, Terassentür schließt nicht richtig) und hygienischer Standart (Ratten im Essensbereich) passten für und nicht zu dem Preissegment.

reviews.title: Staff should be trained better
reviews.text: I stayed in Tan Son Nhat Resort 3 nights on Tet holiday. It took only 3 minutes to the beach. In general, the hotel is quiet and  facility is ok for me. However, restaurant service was terrible, it took 1 hour for order food and at least 15 minutes to ask for the bill, and the food was not so good. Furthermore, the staff are NOT FRIENDLY and UNHELPFUL, we couldn't acess wifi on 2nd day but when I asked staff, they said that they had no idea and they didn't change password while my phone said that incorrect password. I know Con Dao is a small island and services do not developed as other cities do but they need to improve their attitude and service better.

reviews.title: Toplage mit stark renovierungsbedürftigen Bungalow
reviews.positives: die Lage ist ein Traum, wenn man im Bungalow mit Meerblick wohnt.
reviews.negatives: Personal spricht kein Englisch. kein Service am Strand. Die Durschkabine hatte reichlich Algen/ Schimmelflecken, ebenso waren viele Stellen im Bungalow Wasserschäden sichtbar und morschem Holz( Decke und Wände)

reviews.title: Not up to what it promises
reviews.text: All things considered it was not bad, but it is a shame that the resort has expanded considerably, construction still going on, and staff not up to the increased burden. it promises western style food on its signs, but this is completely lacking. Most staff does not speak any English. Hot water was not working, but some other repairs were quickly made.
reviews.positives: clean, good location, relatively quiet

reviews.negatives: Die Zimmer, Betten, Badezimmer, Essen

reviews.title: Nie wieder
reviews.positives: Schöner Strand, gutes Frühstücksbuffet
reviews.negatives: Personal sprach schlecht Englisch, keine Strandliegen trotz Warnung des Hotels vor Sandfliegen, nur wenige teils kaputte unbequeme Stühle, keine Strandtücher, kein freier Tee/Kaffee im Zimmer, abgewohnter, unsauberer Bungalow mit unbequemen Stühlen auf der Terrasse. Hängematte durfte nicht am Bungalow gehängt werden. Wäsche durfte nicht an einer Wäscheleine am Baum getrocknet werden. Wir erhielten nicht den gebuchten und bezahlten Bungalow mit 47qm (neuer Bungalow), sondern einen abgewohnten kleineren Bungalow. Die Bilder stimmten nicht überein. Schlechtes Preis -Leistungs-Verhältnis.

reviews.title: good location, nice room but smelly shower
reviews.text: good location,and the room is big and clean with air condition. However, the shower water pressure is too weak to take a shower and the whole bathroom smells bad.
reviews.positives: good location

reviews.title: Anlage mit sehr großem Potenzial, welches an allen Enden verschenkt wird. Schimmel im Schlafzimmer ist ein absolutes No-
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich, schöne Lage am Strand, schöner Gartenbereich, Transfer vom und zum Flughafen.
reviews.negatives:
Das Zimmer hat an allen Holzwänden geschimmelt. Das Problem wurde angesprochen und man bot uns an, das Zimmer zu reinigen. Nach erfolgter „Reinigung“ waren die Wände absolut unverändert. Als das Problem wieder angesprochen wurde, gab man uns ein anderes Zimmer, welches immerhin „nur“ im Bad und nicht im Schlafzimmer schimmelte… 
Generell schafft es das Resort irgendwie in allen Bereichen in den letzten Zügen zu schludern und so ein unrundes Gefühl zu erzeugen. 
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist groß und mit viel Auswahl, jedoch wird das Essen nicht warm gehalten und enttäuscht im Geschmack, von den deprimierenden Fischbecken im Restaurant mal ganz zu schweigen. 
Die Gartenanlage wird super gepflegt, Müll am Strand vor der Haustür wird aber nicht aufgehoben. 
Die Liste könnte leider endlos weitergeführt werden.

reviews.title: Large rooms, great view
reviews.text: The rooms were very big and had a great view of the ocean. The location is kind of out of the way, but the island is very small anyways. I liked that the rooms were basically on the beach.
reviews.positives: Large rooms, directly on the beach

reviews.title: Traumblick im miesen Hotel
reviews.positives: Der Bungalow am Strand mit seinem Ausblick war unfassbar schön. Der Strand - optisch - ebenso.
reviews.negatives:
Das Personal sprach kaum Englisch, sodass es schwer war, sich verständlich zu machen. Obwohl wir zu viert im Bungalow wohnten, bekamen wir regelmäßig nur 3 Handtücher ins Zimmer gelegt. Das Zimmer selbst wirkte etwas abgewohnt und war vor allem ziemlich verschimmelt. Gereinigt wurde, wie in Asien üblich, eher nur oberflächlich. Das Bad ist schlecht gebaut. An Türen und Fenster sind Spalte, das Wasser der Dusche ist durch falsche Konstruktion in den Raum geflossen und hat alles geflutet. Ablagemöglichkeiten gab es nur begrenzt im Zimmer. Das Bett und das Zustellbett waren hart und das Haus schlecht isoliert, sodass man ab 17 Uhr bis Mitternacht jeden Tag laute Musik hören musste, stellenweise über Stunden mit dem gleichen Lied, sofern es kein Sektengesang war. In einer Nacht gab es im Bungalow gegenüber ein Saufgelage, bei dem die Gäste dort laut Lachten, Sangen und Krach machten. Leider griff die Rezeption auf meine Beschwerde hin nicht ein und ich konnte nach Ende der lauten Musik auch nach Mitternacht nicht schlafen. Das Frühstück war für asiatische Gäste ausgerichtet, Europäer wurden nur bei Toast und Marmelade fündig. Die Egg Station, für die man extra einen Mitarbeiter abstellte, beherrschte nur Spiegeleier, andere Zubereitungsvariationen waren nicht möglich. Das Auffüllen des Frühstücks, das von 6:30-9:00 ging, war sehr zögerlich durch das Personal. 
Der Strand ist nicht ganz sauber, gelegentlich fanden sich Glasscherben oder auch spitze Blatteile der Pflanzen/Palmen darin. Ein Graus waren die Sandfliegen, die einem an einem Nachmittag rote, runde Bisse im mittleren zweistelligen Bereich verpassten, die auch nach über einer Woche noch nicht verheilt sind und weiterhin jucken. Eine der vom Hotel aufgestellten Schaukeln kippte bei der Nutzung durch meine Kinder um. Sie wurde danach einfach wieder aufgestellt, aber weiterhin nicht gesichert. Super gefährlich! Insgesamt sehr viel verschenktes Potential und, wenn man ehrlich ist, ein enttäuschender Aufenthalt.

reviews.title: Friendly Staff but not a good hotel
reviews.text: The rooms were pretty run down, the cable didn't work and we had to be moved from one room where termites were eating through the wall to another room... In Vietnam a room like this would usually be around $30USD rack rate but since there are only 3-4 options on the whole island they can charge a high price for what you get.
reviews.positives: very friendly and helpful staff

reviews.title: Gute Lage mit vielen Abstrichen
reviews.positives: Die Lage direkt am Strand ist schon sehr schön, wenn man die Bungalows mit Meerblick wählt, die Zimmer sind auch ok klar ein wenig in die Jahre gekommen aber völlig ok
reviews.negatives: Warum ich eher eine schlechtere Bewertung gab, der aussenbereich ist leider teils sehr vermüllt nicht nur direkt am strand auch der Garten , sie schaffen es nicht täglich den Müll im Sand aufzusammeln , schade um den eigentlich schönen Garten. Was aber das größte Manko ist: es gibt keinerlei liegemöglichkeiten weder am strand noch im sandigen Garten unter den Palmen, kein Tischchen wo man mal was abstellen könnte, das sollte zu dem Preis möglich sein, es nennt sich ja auch Resort, noch dazu am Strand gibt es leider sehr viele Sandflöhe, ich wusste es nicht und wurde am ganzen Körper gebissen mit heftigem Juckreiz

reviews.title: nice place but not good services
reviews.text: the resort provided an unprofessional service: shortage of breakfirsts for guests who wake up late, no milk for every morning, seafood price was unreasonably expensive. Resort facilities are too too old
reviews.positives: close to the beach

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Der Strabd und die Lage
reviews.negatives: Abendessen und Drinks zu teuer im Verhältnis

reviews.title: great private beach
reviews.text: nice but staff was not attentive maybe due to low season so not many guests stayed at the hotel.
reviews.positives: beach, bar

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Die Lage ist hervorragend. 
Das Frühstücks Buffet ist gut
reviews.negatives:
Ich habe einen Bungalow mit Meerblick gebucht. 

Für die erste Nacht habe ich ein kleines Zimmer ohne Balkon mit Blick auf die Straße bekommen. 

Katastrophe!! Wäre nur noch zu verschlimmern ohne Fenster. Mir wurde ein lächerlicher Rabatt gewährt. Aber darum geht es nicht, der halbe Urlaub war zerstört. 

Am nächsten Tag und nach Beschwerde bei booking.com habe ich das gebuchte Zimmer bekommen. 
Der erste Tag war ruiniert und den Zweiten habe ich gebraucht um mich zu beruhigen. 
Irgendjemand von der Rezeption oder Geschäftsführung tickt nicht sauber.

Ansonsten war das gesamte Personal freundlich und hilfsbereit. 

Es ist alles etwas älter, aber die Lage macht das wieder gut.

reviews.title: Great location mini resort with beach front view!
reviews.text:
We stayed for 2 nites, 3 days, the room was spacious, well-located with beautiful view to the blue sea, shady big trees so you can fall asleep on the lazy chair without getting sunshine into the eye.

2 minutes riding motorbike to the center of the town where there's not much to see though. Booking tour visit some attractions is very straight forward.

Bonus is the food from the restaurant is very tasty however a little pricy for the range of private resort.

Staff were not well trained to communicate with guess.
reviews.positives: By the sea, private villas

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Wir hatten einen Bungalow mit Blick auf das Meer und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
reviews.negatives: Leider hatten wir sehr viele Schnaken im Zimmer.

reviews.title: Off season
reviews.text: Not so  busy, very nice beach ！

reviews.title: Ein verlassenes einsames Paradies perfekt zum entspannen
reviews.positives:
Die Lage ist Top 
Der Strand ein Traum sehr breit bei Ebbe und weißer Strand noch sehr verlassen
reviews.negatives:
Abends oft Karaoke ziemlich laut .
Frühstück sehr vietnamesisch wenig westliches Essen .
Keine liegen am Strand die einheimischen würden sich ja auch nie in die Sonne legen .
Euro zu wechseln war nicht möglich

reviews.title: Nice.
reviews.text: It is a nice place, nice gardens. Nice beach. Sadly no pool if conditions not good for beach.  I wanted to be away from people so booked bungalow. But 2 bungalows are joined together. If you get quiet neighbours no problem.  Overall. Nice place

reviews.title: Hotel mit einer fantastischen Lage wenn man sich den Strandbungalow nimmt.
reviews.positives:
Bungalow mit Strandblick ist fantastisch und sehr geräumig mit allem was man benötigt. Kühlschrank, Stauraum, netter Sanitärbereich. Garten ist schön angelegt und es gibt am Strand einfache Duschen um sich das Salzwasser vom Körper zu waschen. Gute sanft steuerbare Klimaanlage, die nicht gleich die kalte Luft auf das Bett pustet.
Frühstück ist gut und umfangreich es könnte aber hin und wieder auch noch eine Abwechselung bei den Früchten geben. Jeden Tag Drachenfrucht und Wassermelone könnte man anders machen.
Blick auf das Meer und den Strand ist super.
Mieten von Motorrädern über die Hotelrezeption funktioniert super.
reviews.negatives:
Matratze des Doppelbettes war ein wenig durchgelegen und man konnte teilweise die Bettfedern spüren.
Im Essensbereich gibt es mehrere Becke mit lebenden Fischen. Dieses Aquarium wird mit einer Pumpe permanent mit Wasser befüllt. Die Pumpe gibt einen hohen sehr unangenehmen Ton von sich, so dass ein Sitzen in der Nähe der Anlage nicht schön ist.

reviews.title: Great position but buildings very tired
reviews.text: Great location and friendly staff but needs maintenance and cleaning especially the bathrooms

reviews.title: Lage Top, Rest Flop!
reviews.positives: Die tolle Lage direkt am Strand
reviews.negatives:
Der Bungalow bedürfte einer dringenden Renovierung. Es funktioniert als, ist aber in einem traurigen Zustand. 
Einmal streichen - und alles würde passen.
Im Grunde spricht nur eine sehr nette Rezeptionistin etwas Englisch ..

reviews.title: A little bit far from the local market
reviews.text: The room is too big and scatter. Breakfast is not qualified as a 3 star hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Die Lage direkt am Strand. Die Bungalows sind gemütlich und kühl. Der Service war super!
Das beste Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis der Insel.
reviews.negatives: Die Anlage ist inzwischen etwas in die Jahre gekommen, allerdings muss man bedenken, dass Con Dao keine Touristen Hochburg ist und es entsprechend weniger Auswahl.

reviews.title: Nice place to stay but don't break anything during your stay!
reviews.text: Good location , beach bungalow had nice view of beach, I wrote a more detailed review of this hotel on TripAdvisor .  A ceramic soap dispenser that is sold in markets for less than two dollars was broken during our stay and the hotel charged us between 19 and 20 usd.  It was more than upsetting .  Airport transfers were handled well.  Mini bar aa reasonably stocked .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Die Lage am Strand, die Freundlichkeit und Hilfsbereitschaft des Personals
reviews.negatives: was ich am meisten vermisst habe, ist, dass es keine Liegestühle am Strand gab.

reviews.title: Sea-view apartment
reviews.text: I booked an apartment which was called "sea-view" inn a hope that I might actually get a sea-view but I ended up in the rearmost apartment facing a garden (it was the most far away from the beach) - when I asked the guy that I booked a sea-view he told me in broken english that this is a sea-view. When I asked him what is the garden view apartment - he didn't say anything and just smiled. Altogether had trouble with english here also quality of food was so so - breakfast really bad in terms of western standards but it's not a bad value for Con Dao

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Lage wunderschön! Peronal extrem freundlich und hilfsbereit; Spa service , scooter Verleih alles prima,
Strand sehr schön!
reviews.negatives: Frühstück auf Vietnamesische und asiatische Gäste ausgelegt, aber haben wir erwartet und absolut kein Problem!

reviews.title: Acceptable 3-star accomodation.
reviews.text:
I was there alone a few years ago, so my expectations matched the experience.
Apart from the very expensive luxury resort of Six Senses, I consider Sea Travel Resort best alternative on the island.
However, the resort has got a few challenges:
- Would be easy to keep surroundings much more tidy.
- The loungers at the beach were fixed with short chains making use of them very limited. Chains should be removed during daytime.
reviews.positives: Kind staff, near to beach, acceptable value for money

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Super Lage direkt am Strand 
gutes Frühstück

reviews.title: A slice of paradise needing some renovation
reviews.text:
A comfortable stay at a nice hotel with a beautiful location right near a nice beach. 

Some construction is going on with new facilities being built while current bathrooms in bungalows are in need of renovation.

Comfortable main rooms with ocean views, breakfast is limited but fine, the island is the main best feature.
reviews.positives: Location, beach, airport shuttle

reviews.title: Sehr gut und paradiesisch
reviews.positives: Sehr gute Lage direkt am Strand und traumhafte Palmenlandschaft

reviews.title: Fantastic View
reviews.text: this hotel is beautiful and has nice staff. all of the rooms are large and on the beach. however, roosters start to crow around 6:00-6:30am and there is no way to avoid hearing it. also, the hotel is next to a restaurant-type place and a bar so there is noise from both sides at night and in the morning. this is not a place to stay if you want to sleep in the morining without getting woken up. also, the beach is infested with sand flees - they bite a lot. when we were tehre the hotel decided to put in new walkways throughout the entire complex. the workers were all soldiers and would stare at women on the beach. they also started working at 7am. there was no warning of this nor apology from the staff. it was pretty insulting. also, the restaurant is very  expensive. just walk across the street  and there is great food at a much lower price.
reviews.positives: View, proximity to beach

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Wir hatten ein Bungalow mit Garten View und es war traumhaft. Es war die perfekte Lage, direkt am Strand. Der Strand ist sauber und so auch unser Bungalow. Wir haben öfters im Restaurant gegessen, was wir auch sehr empfehlen können.
reviews.negatives: Es wäre für mich eine volle 10/10 geworden, wenn sie noch liegen für den Strand gehabt hätten. Auch war die Kommunikation echt schwer. Das Englisch ist sehr rar (aber auf der ganzen Insel allgemein).

reviews.title: Great location, service could be improved
reviews.text: we had a very good time at con dao sea travel resort. a great place to hide away and to enjoy clean, beautiful beach.
reviews.positives: Very big, comfortable rooms right on the beach

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr schön Lage und das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit
reviews.negatives: Nicht

reviews.title: Great beach and good location
reviews.text:
As for the bathroom, I stayed at bungalow area so the bathroom area was ok with separate toilet and shower area but my friends stayed at the new residence area they told me their bathrooms were not good due to the toilet snd shower are not separated so it was wet all over the bathroom area after each shower 
The room itself was ok
The breakfast had good selection and tasty 
The beach I think it has the best beach of the island 
The only thing that they need to improve is to provide beach chairs and lounge
They don’t provide beach towels 
WiFi was ok
Grad/taxi were plenty around 
Sightseeing not much to see on the island, it took a few hours to complete the main highlight places

reviews.title: Schön
reviews.positives:
Das Personal ist nicht unfreundlich, wie es in manchen Bewertungen behauptet wird. Allerdings spricht es sehr schlecht Englisch, dadurch wahrscheinlich manchmal der distanzierte Eindruck.
Die Anlage ist alles in allem sehr schön, an manchen Stellen wie schon geschrieben etwas in die Jahre gekommen, aber sauber, was deutlich wichtiger ist. Die Lage ist wundervoll und man könnte den ganzen Tag dort sitzen und aufs Meer schauen, leider gibt es nur 2 Hängematten und 5 Stühle. Wenn die Anlage also gut besucht ist muss man sich auf sein Handtuch legen. Obwohl es direkt am Stadtstrand liegt auch sehr ruhig und man ist fast allein am Strand. 
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sehr reichhaltig, aber fast nur vietnamesisch, was für Europäer etwas ungewohnt ist. Hier sehe ich aber keinen Kritikpunkt. Wenn ich nach Vietnam in den Urlaub fahre, dann gibt es eben vietnamesisches Essen. 
Toll ist, dass das Zimmer täglich gereinigt wird. Das ist in Asien nicht selbstverständlich. Wirklich angenehm. 
Überall an der Anlage hat man sehr gutes WLAN, sogar am Strand. Das ist Top!
reviews.negatives:
Ein paar neue Möbel und Strandstühle würden die Anlage deutlich aufwerten. Liegen am Strand oder unter den Palmen auf der Hotelanlage wären ein Traum. Die Anlage ist so schön und dann gibt es kaum Plätze, wo man sich gemütlich niederlassen kann. 
Die Dusche müsste dringend mal mit Kalkreiniger geputzt werden, ansonsten ist es sauber.
Traurig ist, dass an diesem Strand extrem viel Plastikmüll angespült wird. Dieser wird 1-2x täglich weggeräumt aber trotzdem wird man oft damit konfrontiert. Dafür kann aber der Hotelbetreiber nichts! Man sollte sich trotzdem bewusst sein, wenn man hier wohnt.
Der Weg in die Stadt ist relativ lang und an dunklen Straßen entlang. Man braucht also einen Roller oder ein Taxi, das einen dort hin bringt. Gibt aber auch einige Restaurants um die Anlage herum, man muss also nicht zwingend in die Stadt.

reviews.title: 6 nights at Tan Son Nhat in Con Dao
reviews.text:
We had a great time at Tan Son Nhat resort. The resort has its charm, though it seems that it has been a few years since it has been refreshed. 

For the price, it is hard to complain. But there were some elements of the resort that future visitors should be aware of. 

The staff at the resort seemed overwhelmed. The crew was small and outmatched by the volume of guests at dinner service. It was hard to get the attention of the waitstaff but it wasn’t really their fault. They were seriously outnumbered and overburdened. We felt really bad for them while at the same time we didn’t really get the service we expected for a resort of this scale. 

The resort offered motorbike rental but when we tried to rent one, it was actually not possible and it was hard to understand exactly why. We rented easily from a nearby business. 

The entire island of Con Dao is under serious construction, updating utilities and infrastructure. The government expects to host 5 million visitors a year to this tiny island and they are working hard to achieve that.  It is truly beautiful and a fantastic place to visit. The locals are a bit wary of tourists so it is important to learn some Vietnamese to be polite and make some new friends. 

All in all,  we enjoyed our trip. We would have been glad to pay a bit more at Tan Son Nhat if it meant that the rooms were a bit more updated and the staff had a bit more help!

reviews.title: Schöne Tage am Palmenstrand
reviews.positives: Wir hatten 2 Bungalows gebucht, einen für uns mit Gartenblick und einen für die Kinder/Enkelkinder mit Meerblick, letzterer spektakulär. Schöner Sandstrand mit schattigen Plätzen unter Palmen. Auch einen "Foodtruck" am Strand gibt's. Angenehm sind die Hängematten. Das Essen/Frühstück war ok. Wer Appetit auf "Western Style"-Essen hat: Nebenan gibt's die BAR200. Wir haben uns wohl gefühlt und würden wieder kommen.

reviews.title: Tan Son Nat
reviews.text: Beachfront bungalow was beautifully positioned, quiet and comfortable. But a few things to bear in mind - the place makes few concessions to Western tastes, and not much English is spoken (although staff are super helpful). For example, there are no loungers on the beach or anywhere, and breakfast is very much the local version. Also, it's not the same place as the Con Dao Resort - that's next door.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Super Lage am schönsten Strand der Insel. 
Super Preis Leistungs Verhältnis. 
Essen im Restaurant sehr lecker und authentisch.
reviews.negatives: Der gebuchte Strandbungalow war nicht beim Check in verfügbar. Aber wir konnten dann am Folgetag in einen Bungalow mit Seaview umziehen.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Location and staff is alright but the bungalows need some refreshment. Unfortunately breakfast is not tasty.

reviews.title: Tolle Strandlage, haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt
reviews.positives: Wir waren als Familie sehr froh die Anlage nah am Ort gewählt zu haben! Der Bungalow am Strand war fantastisch , das Personal ausgesprochen freundlich und das Frühstücksbüffet sehr vielseitig! Nur der Kaffee war viel zu stark und es gab nur eine Teesorte. Dafür reichlich Obst und warme Speisen. Auch die Massagen im Spa waren sehr gut! Wir würden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen!
reviews.negatives: S.o.

reviews.title: Great location,  beach bungalows are nice, service is mediocre at best though friendly
reviews.text:
Beach front is worth it but garden view rooms are newer. Location is off beach so a swim is literally walk across beach to water! (Note: rooms are set back 20 meters from beach) Staff does its best with non-Vietnamese speakers but don't expect much service. Breakfast is minimal but did have omelette/ egg bar.
Can be noisy as all rooms are duplexes, bring ear plugs to ensure good sleep. Mattress was old and sagging.
Overall, should I return to Con Dao I would opt for neighboring resort. Newer and nicer but of course a bit more expensive.

reviews.title: PECCATO,UN SOGNO DIVENTATO INCUBO
reviews.positives: La posizione
reviews.negatives:
Purtroppo abbiamo trovato le cimici del letto nella camera.
Sono stata punta 49 volte nelle 3 notti in cui abbiamo pernottato nel bungalow con vista mare.
Dopo aver preso coscienza che le punture non erano di zanzare ma di cimici abbiamo chiesto di cambiare camera, ne volevamo una in  struttura nella parte in cemento.

La pulizia è molto approssimativa, se si offrono bungalow, questi richiedono una manutenzione diversa dalle camere in una struttura in cemento.
Dopo la nostra richiesta ci era stato proposto un altro bungalow che però dopo una nostra ispezione, spostando il letto e comodini, è risultato nelle stesse condizioni del precedente, con cimici morte e sporco trascurato nel tempo.

Oltre alle cimici c'erano sparse nei 2 letti matrimoniali anche le formiche.

Abbiamo speso 648 euro per 8 notti in bungalow, pagando al nostro arrivo, e sicuramente non ci aspettavamo una situazione del genere.
Abbiamo dormito in hotel molto più modesti di questo durante il nostro viaggio in Vietnam ma arrivati sull'isola,  essendo il nostro viaggio di nozze volevamo regalarci una settimana di comodità. 
Cosi non è stato.

La colazione è prettamente vietnamita, con zuppe a base di carne, verdura,pesce.  noodles, verdure e poco altro.
Di continentale c'erano soltanto latte, caffè vietnamita e del pane.

reviews.title: Sẽ tuyệt vời nếu không bị dính ghẻ ngứa từ chăn mền.
reviews.text: Nói chung khách sạn rất ok, vị trí thuận tiện, view bãi biển đẹp, nhân viên rất chu đáo và thân thiện, buffet sáng đa dạng & hợp khẩu vị. Tuy nhiên, khách sạn có 1 điểm trừ duy nhất là về vấn đề vệ sinh. Khăn mặt sau khi giặt xong vết dơ, ố vàng vẫn còn. Chăn mền thì ẩm ướt mà vẫn đem cho khách sd ( có thể là do dịp mình đi mưa hơi nhiều, mình đi 5-7/8/2018, nên chăn mền chưa kịp khô & cũng chắc không có điều kiện tiệt trùng cẩn thận) nên mình cùng gia đình, tổng cộng 10 người ( bao gồm 7 người lớn & 3 trẻ em) đều bị nổi mẩn ngứa, mẩn to giống như là bị virut ghẻ ngứa từ người đi trước. Tới nay đã 3 ngày kể từ khi trở về, mình và gia đình vẫn còn thi nhau gãi & mẩn thì không lặn được luôn. Điều này làm mình không dám quay lại lần nữa vì biết đâu virut đó vẫn còn. Nếu ks có thể khắc phục được thì tốt biết mấy.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: L hotel ha una buona posizione, una spiaggia privata, servizio di transfer da/per areoporto compreso nella tariffa della camera , ho usufruito del servizio di ristorazione per le colazioni comprese nelle tariffe  ti fanno anche al momento vari tipi di uova, poi abbiamo fatto un apertivo con  cena, un pranzo veloce appena arrivati  e un paio di merende con gelato e smoothie e devo dire che ho mangiato bene. Ho noleggiato uno scooter al costo di 150.000 Dong al giorno, prezzo nella media dei rental avuti in Vietnam (in generale). Personale gentile.
reviews.negatives:
La camera era un bungalow datato,con una pulizia molto approssimativa se non scarsa, di giorno dovevo tenere le luci accese se avevo bisogno, perché un po angusto, nonostante la parete a vetrata,  probabilmente a causa  della posizione e della tappezzeria viola che appesantisce il tutto. Non sapevo avesse il bagno all aperto e quando piove la zona del WC si allaga (consiglierei di rivalutare la copertura sopra).
Spiaggia privata tenuta in maniera moooolto approssimativa con seggiole pieghevoli in metallo, grandezza bambini, per cui fastidiose e scomode e Mal messe, consiglierei essendo uno spazio privato e che non necessita di ombrelloni grazie alle grandi palme che offrono una bella ombra, di rivalutare le sedute, cambiare le sedie e mettere delle sdraio facendo un investimento almeno su questo. Passando al noleggio dei motorini, essendo tutti turisti, avendo la necessità di usare il navigatore, direi che avere un porta telefono attaccato sia la base, soprattutto se si è da soli senza copilota. Il ristornate, come detto ho mangiato bene, la colazione non ha molta scelta è più vietnamita/asiatica.

reviews.title: nice but dont go during island rainy season from dec-jan
reviews.text: no complaints but make sure you check weather reports before booking tix; take electric cart for tour around island for something different and scenic!

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Sea view vs. Beach Front
reviews.text:
Pros: 
1) Room type: I booked a "sea view" room, thought that this is the room by the beach.  But, I was so disappointed because it was not as close to the beach as I hope and you almost need a binocular to see a gleam of the ocean. I went to the front desk just to learn that if I want to see the ocean up close then I need to book a "beach front" room.  Luckily, for a small charge, I was able to upgrade to "beach front" room the next day.  OMG! I got a room with perfect view. I love it!!! My advise to you is if you love to see the beach like I do, you might want to double check with the resort (ask them to send you resort map) before booking.
2) Location: I like the location of this resort because it's close to town and just a walking distance to several good seafood restaurants nearby.  Also, it's really close to the dive shop DIVE DIVE DIVE which is my favorite Dive Operation and the new pier (cau tau).
3) Staffs: young and friendly but overall service was just OK.
4) What to do: Every day, I walked along the beach (~1.5miles round trip), bike for 1 1/2 hours visiting landmarks, hiking Dam Tre Bay and enjoy the “ocean view” from my bed.
Cons: 
1) Breakfast: It’s just so so.  
2) Bugs: Too many sand fleas. These are nasty small bugs can cause severe skin problems. They typically bite the feet, ankles and legs because they are closest to the ground but these fleas here can bite your neck, fact too.  They leave terrible itch and scars on your skin for a long time.  At first I was wondering why there was not a lot of people hang out on the beach.  After 10mins lying on the chaise on the beach, I can answer my own question, I got ~25 bites.
I believe this resort can be rated much higher if they can find a way to eliminate this sand fleas.

reviews.title: Good hotel, great location
reviews.text: Stay at the Con Doa Sea Travel resort was very good. The staff were very friendly and helpful. Food at the Con Dao Sea Travel resort was OK, rooms were OK as well. The location is definitely the best asset of this hotel, you have a view of the beach from the room which is great. In general, be aware of the fact that on a tropical island you will find numerous critters joining you to enjoy the beach and surroundings. Having said that we did not see or experience any unwelcome visitors in the room itself, sometimes we heard some things go bump in the night though. Looking at the other options at Con Dao I think we made the right choice to go here.

reviews.title: Close to beach
reviews.text:
It was pleasant. The hotel was quiet and perfect for couples to take a quiet break away. One must hire a scooter, it is fun the roads are quiet, you do not need a licence to hire one. I would not recommend to go in December if you want to Scuba or Snorkel because of the weather. We unfortunately went with a scuba school. It was not good. I am a advanced mix gas scuba diver so trust me it was not good. The other school on the island actually did not go out because of the weather. I heard from locals
the time to go is in and around April. 3 Days on the island is enough. One will see everything in 3 days.

reviews.title: nice location, a little bit too expensive
reviews.text:
the con dao sea travel resort is first of all not a resort at all but a really nice complex of bungalows. they have garden view, sea view and beach front. some bungalows are older (most of the beach front ones) and the others are very new and really nice and quite modern. I stayed a couple of days in a seaview one, which is actually also more garden view and some days in the beach front, which is beautiful. in that one the air condition was not working and they did not manage to fix but at night it wasn't too hot, so it was ok.
the staff is really nice and helpful and 2-3 speak very good english. 
the breakfast was fine for me. they had typical vietnamese breakfast but also bread and jelly and eggs and some fruits, nothing special and not too much to choose from but totally fine. 
the beach is also quite nice but due to the fisher boats quite dirty, something that the hotel should take care off! It is a pity that the beautiful beach is treated like that. there are also, as other people mentioned, some beach flies which are quite annoying even though the bites didnt itch. 
we rented scooters/ motorbikes to go to other beaches, especially the airport one is very nice.

reviews.title: Great island - Great people - Good hotel
reviews.text:
It's a very nice Bungalow. The room is a bit too large (less warm feeling).

The resort is not at center of the town but you can go to the center by walking.

It's a very very small town. You only have to spend 30 minutes to go around the town.

The people at Con Dao island are very nice. The lifestyle is a bit slow and peaceful.
reviews.positives: Very nice location ie. next to the beach

reviews.title: Akta er for strandflugor
reviews.positives: Stranden dock otroligt mycket strand flugor som gjorde fruktansvärda bett som köade infernaliskt i många dagar.. Trots att det blåste på stranden. Ägg station där man kunde få omelett.
reviews.negatives: Lite sunkigt ställe. Skulle behövas rustas upp. Dåligt med varmvatten. Stor frukost bestående av ljumna vietnamesiska rätter.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is in a good location staff friendly and helpful. It’s a bit out dated but works. We didn’t get free airport transfer with our Agoda booking they said but they arranged the bus and it was 50k vnđ per person each way. The beach is right there and that was what we wanted so it worked for us.  The bathrooms need updating and the decor in the rooms are a bit tired but we were coming to go out and do things and didn’t need a  flashy room. The coconut coffee was perfect there and the eating area next to the beach was good enough ! It’s the view of the sea and the islands and the decent beach that make it a good place to stay for a few nights. Not complaints we were fine there just observations. Not a deal breaker for the kind of trip we wanted to have.

reviews.title: Bra boende för att bra pris, och vill man ha nära till stranden är detta perfekt.
reviews.positives:
Mycket bra läge på den västra delen av staden/beachen. Staden är inte stor och enkelt att promenera runt, mycket lite trafik. Vi hade rum i hotelldelen med utsikt mot vattnet, även om en del träd skymmer lite. Bungalowena ner mot stranden såg ok ut och är säkert ett bra alternativ, men lite dyrare förstås. Det finns en stor frukostbuffe med mycket vietnamesiska och lite mindre europeiska alternativ. Prisvärt.
Vi åt i övrigt inte på hotellet, så har ingen input om maten. De hämtade och lämnade på flygplatsen utan kostnad.
reviews.negatives: Kaffet på frukosten var ingen höjdare, vi hade eget nescafe med oss! Hotellet är kanske lite slitet, och handdukar t.ex. har sett sina bästa dagar. Badrummen lite ålderstigna, men allt funkar fint. Kunde kanske finnas lite mer stolar/solstolar vi stranden.

reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Na dwie godziny przed przylotem na wyspę Con Dao, wysłałam zapytanie do Hotelu, czy istnieje możliwość pozostawienia swoich bagaży jeszcze przed czasem odbioru pokoju. Mieliśmy wówczas zarezerwowane (z dwumiesięcznym wyprzedzeniem!) dwa dwuosobowe bungalowy z widokiem na morze. W odpowiedzi dostałam informację, że hotel przeprasza za pomyłkę, ale pomimo mojej rezerwacji, nie mają dla nas tych bungalow. Kosztowało nas to dużo nerwów i stresu, ponieważ zależało nam na tym, żeby nasz nocleg nie był w hotelu i żeby (po długiej wielodniowej podróży) spędzić w końcu trzy noce w jednym miejscu. Komunikacja z recepcją (już na miejscu) była utrudniona; proponowali nam bardzo niekorzystne warunki przeniesienia się do ichniejszych pokoi hotelowych po standardowej cenie(!). W trakcie negocjacji okazało się, że mogą zaproponować nam tylko jedną noc w Bungalowach, ponieważ później przyjeżdżają inni goście i mimo tego, że to my jesteśmy pierwsi do zameldowania, obsługa hotelu nie widziała innej możliwości, żeby na kolejną noc nas wymeldować z danego pokoju. Koszmar. Finalnie doszliśmy do porozumienia, w którym spędziliśmy pierwszą i trzecią noc w bungalowach, a środkową w ichniejszym pokoju hotelowym, po niższej cenie. Jednak pokój hotelowy znacząco odbiegał standardem od domków, a przenosząc się z jednego pokoju do drugiego co chwilę musieliśmy zostawiać swoje bagaże na recepcji, bo oczywiście pokój nie był gotowy. Dodatkowo w ramach rekompensaty dostaliśmy zniżkę na pierwszy posiłek w barze, o którym przy finalnej płatności obsługa oczywiście zapomniała i dopiero nasze wykłócanie się przypomniało im o obiecanej zniżce. W międzyczasie Hotel prosił mnie, żebym odwołała rezerwację na bookingu z informacją, że to ja nie dojechałam(!), aby nie musieli ponosić konsekwencji finansowych w stosunku do strony booking. 
Serdecznie odradzam.

reviews.title: The whole family was bitten by mosquitoes.
reviews.text: The hotel environment is nice, by the sea, quiet and spacious, with a buffet offering a variety of delicious dishes in moderation. However, all members of my family were bitten by mosquitoes all over their legs. Three people were lying on three different beds and still got bitten, with both legs itching like crazy. We were satisfied with everything except for the cleanliness issue, so we are afraid we might experience the same thing again if we come back.

Great location, and the accomdations are pretty good, as is service.

One thing to note is there are stray dogs hanging around the resort, some of which will bark at you, others seem very unhealthy. Not a big deal, they don't seem to bother people too often, and they aren't always around, but it's worth noting. Still worth it for the location right on the beach

Snídaně byla různorodá, dobrá, vždy se dalo něco vybrat,zde personál absolutně neuměl anglicky, a k tomu ještě ani ne moc sympatický,vypadali otráveně. Na recepci ochotný personál. V okolí málo možností stravování.Doporučujeme si půjčit skůtry někde jinde než zde v hotelu
reviews.negatives: Vše ok, Con Dao je ostrov ještě nezahlcený turismem. Moc jsme si to tady užili.

reviews.title: Great beach vibes
reviews.text: The location was great. It could be quite loud at night but generally music was turned off around 10pm which was fine. Mostly caters to Vietnamese tourists but we had no issues. Rooms as described in photos, slightly dated but clean. The only thing I really wanted was beach lounges, the beach is beautiful!

reviews.title: Staff is playing games, do not recommend
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: I agreed on sea view bungalow upgrade but when I arrived it was not available due to “maintenance”, didn’t see any work going on there. We agreed to pay 50% and move to standard room and have only last night at agreed bungalow. On the final day they requested to pay another 50%, couple of minutes before the shuttle pickup. While I was paying at the counter, another new arrived family ran into same bungalow issue. I feel like I got tricked twice. Avoid this hotel if you dont want to ruin your experience at the beautiful island.

reviews.title: A nightmare.
reviews.positives: A part from the location, the hotel was very disappointing.
reviews.negatives: One of the dirtiest hotel I have ever seen. There were bed bugs in my bed and horrible mosquitos and flies everywhere. The beach was never cleaned. Used masks, food waste and plastic everywhere. Staff not serious at all. When I complained about the hygiene they were laughing at me. Scarse English. Poor  cousine.

reviews.title: Service was a let down
reviews.text: Stayed in the beach bungalow which was amazing. Service at dinner was terrible. We were the first to sit down then others came. They got their menu and were ordering food and we hadn't been served. Had to go to counter and ask for a menu. Others were getting food delivered before our order had been taken. The only thing on my meal that I ordered was the crispy fried noodles. Everything else was wrong. The drink waiter tried to serve me warm white wine in a glass tumbler full of ice.  When asked for something different was told to go buy it at the beach bar. Others were getting drinks served at their table.  For that reason it won't get 5 stars.

reviews.title: Expensive and worst than any other cheaper accommodation in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Lovely beachfront room in a stunning location.
reviews.positives:
We loved the location, especially our beach front  bungalow. The room was very clean, the beds were comfortable and the shower and aircon were good. Moped hire was easy and reasonably priced from reception.
The staff were friendly.
The beach and sea outside the hotel were really clean.
reviews.negatives:
We found breakfast disappointing, there was very little options for Western tastes for example the 'Orange Juice' was just Mirinda soda. 
Certain parts of the hotel seemed a little run down.
It was unclear that that the coffee sachets in the room are not free, you'll be charged when you check out, it's the first time I've ever had to pay for Nescafe at a hotel.
